_**Agent (gpt-5.4 2026-03-12 00:36:15Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="shell"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **shell**</summary>

**Input:**

- command:

```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
files = [
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/card.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/editor.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/settings.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/core/state/stores/ui.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/types/editor.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/types/layout.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/types/settings.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/types/window.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/layouts/use-layout-switch.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/layouts/infinite-canvas/use-canvas.ts',
'归档/Chips-Editor/src/layouts/workbench/use-workbench.ts',
]
for path in files:
    text = Path(path).read_text()
    print(f'===== {path}')
    # imports
    imports = re.findall(r"^import .* from '([^']+)'", text, re.M)
    if imports:
        print('imports:', ', '.join(imports))
    # interfaces/types exported
    decls = re.findall(r'export\s+(?:interface|type|const|function)\s+([A-Za-z0-9_]+)', text)
    print('exports:', ', '.join(decls[:30]))
    # state interface fields
    m = re.search(r'export interface (\w+State) \{(.*?)\n\}', text, re.S)
    if m:
        body = m.group(2)
        fields = re.findall(r'\n\s*([A-Za-z0-9_]+):', body)
        print(f'{m.group(1)} fields:', ', '.join(fields))
    # actions method names heuristics
    m = re.search(r'actions:\s*\{(.*?)(?:\n\s*\}\);?|\n\s*\},\s*$)', text, re.S)
    if m:
        body = m.group(1)
        methods = re.findall(r'\n\s*([A-Za-z0-9_]+)\s*\([^\)]*\)\s*:', body)
        print('actions:', ', '.join(methods[:80]))
    print()
PY]
```

- timeout_ms: `20000`
- workdir: `/Users/sevenstars/Documents/ChipsCard/Develop/Project-13-2-f`

**Result:**

</details></tool-use>

```
[bash -lc python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
import re
root = Path('归档/Chips-Editor/src')
files = list((root/'core/state/stores').glob('*.ts')) + list((root/'types').glob('*.ts')) + list((root/'layouts').rglob('*.ts')) + list((root/'layouts').rglob('*.vue'))
for path in sorted(files):
    text = path.read_text()
    imports = re.findall(r"import\s+(?:type\s+)?(?:[\s\S]*?)\s+from\s+'([^']+)'", text)
    if imports:
        print(path)
        for imp in imports:
            print('  ->', imp)
PY]
```
